Title: Allows Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of deputy sheriff for the Broome county sheriff's office
Summary: Allows Ivan Cruz to be eligible to take the civil service exam for the position of deputy sheriff for the Broome county sheriff's office.
